headline: Whistleblower Platform Receives 12,000 Reports in First Year
context: The protected digital whistleblower platform launched in March 2025 received 12,000 reports in its first year of operation.

cards.big: Whistleblower platform received 12,000 reports in first year since launch
cards.sub: Digital channel provides encrypted anonymous reporting for corruption and abuse
2,200 reports involved workplace safety and labour violations

cards.big: MACC acted on 850 reports leading to 45 formal investigations
cards.sub: 35 reports led to criminal charges within the first 12 months

cards.big: Platform identity protection tested in court with zero leaks to date
cards.sub: Whistleblower Protection Act 2010 updated in 2025 to cover digital submissions

cards.big: Whistleblower protection tests whether anonymous reporting can survive institutional pressure
12,000 whistleblower reports in year one. Reporting volume means nothing without investigation and protection.
